app.title: BioOrchestrator
app.subtitle: Multi-domain biodiversity pipeline — Agriculture · Livestock · Forestry · Agroforestry

varietyFinder.title: Variety Finder
varietyFinder.noResults: No varieties found matching this environment. Try different climate or soil filters.

empty.title: No data retrieved.
empty.hint: Select filters and search to retrieve real data from DAD-IS.

errors.loadBreeds: Failed to load breeds from DAD-IS.

settings.title: DAD-IS API Configuration
settings.description: The FAO DAD-IS API cannot be used for commercial purposes. Each user must provide their own API credentials obtained directly from FAO.

fallback.title: Available Data Sources (without DAD-IS)
fallback.description: The BioOrchestrator integrates multiple biodiversity data sources via IkerKeta that are available without DAD-IS credentials:

sources.gbif: Global livestock occurrence records via GBIF-mediated data
sources.agrovoc: FAO agricultural thesaurus — species, breeds, and practices
sources.eppo: European plant protection organisation — pest and disease data
sources.globaltreesearch: Botanic Gardens Conservation International — tree species
sources.pesticides: European Commission — authorised plant protection products
sources.cpvo: Community Plant Variety Office — registered crop varieties

phenology.notFound: No parameters found for this selection
phenology.usingDefaults: Using default parameters — no exact match for this selection

contribute.title: Contribute phenology parameter
contribute.description: Submit your research data for scientific review. Your contribution will be reviewed by an administrator before being merged into the main parameter set.
contribute.author: Author(s)
contribute.success: Parameter submitted for review. Thank you for your contribution.

phenology.usingDefaultsDetail: Using generic FAO-56 values for {{params}}. No cultivar-specific data for this species.

dataGaps.title: Agronomic data
dataGaps.yieldUnavailable: Yield estimation is unavailable until missing data is completed.

thermal.title: Thermal Tolerance
thermal.subtitle: Heat and frost stress damage limits for each crop. Data automatically derived from EcoCrop or published in scientific literature.
thermal.empty: No thermal thresholds available for this species. If EcoCrop has temperature data, thresholds can be derived automatically.
thermal.pendingDerivation: {{count}} EcoCrop species have temperature data but thresholds haven't been derived yet.

npk.title: Nutrient Absorption Profile (NPK)
npk.subtitle: Nitrogen, phosphorus, and potassium absorption rates per phenological stage. Data from peer-reviewed scientific literature.
npk.totalRow: Total N: {{n}} kg/ha  Total P: {{p}} kg/ha  Total K: {{k}} kg/ha (full season)
npk.empty: No NPK absorption profile for this species.
npk.disclaimer: Absorption rates are indicative. Actual values depend on management, soil, climate, and planting density.

soil.title: Soil Requirements
soil.subtitle: Optimal soil conditions for each crop. Data from EcoCrop GAEZ v4 (FAO).
soil.empty: No soil requirements available for this species.
soil.allPresent: All catalog crops have EcoCrop soil requirements.

rotation.title: Rotation Constraints
rotation.subtitle: Minimum intervals between crops to prevent soil pathogens and depletion. Data from FAO guidelines and phytopathological literature.
rotation.empty: No rotation constraints registered for this crop. If no restrictions are known, free rotation is assumed.
rotation.lowCoverage: Only {{count}} rotation rules registered. Most crops lack data.

panel.noCrop: This parcel has no crop assigned. Assign one to see agronomic recommendations.
panel.cropNotInCatalog: The crop '{{crop}}' is not in the catalog. Agronomic data is not available.
panel.none: No agronomic data for this crop. Recommendations cannot be generated without it.
panel.partial: Missing {{n}} data types. Recommendations may be incomplete.
panel.scenarioIncomplete: Both crops have incomplete data. The comparison may be inconclusive.
panel.deprecatedSoilNote: Deprecated data — coming soon from Soil module

vegetation.title: Vegetation Indices
vegetation.noEntity: The vegetation-health module has not processed this parcel yet.
vegetation.noDataInPeriod: No images available in the selected period. Try a wider range.
vegetation.lowCount: Only {{count}} images available. Trend may not be representative — possible cloud cover.

soilPanel.title: Soil Data
soilPanel.noEntity: The soil module has not processed this parcel. Soil data requires defining horizons and selecting data providers.

assign.title: Assign variety to parcel
assign.organicWarningBody: Only {{organicTrials}} organic trials vs {{conventionalTrials}} conventional for this crop/climate. Yield and risk calculations have lower precision. Estimated yield: -{{pct}}% (Seufert et al. 2012, Ponisio et al. 2015).
assign.noParcels: No parcels available. Create a parcel first.

parcelHealth.title: Parcel Health
parcelHealth.selectPrompt: Select a parcel to view its health status
parcelHealth.noCrop: No crop assigned to this parcel yet.
parcelHealth.goToVarietyFinder: Go to Variety Finder to assign a crop variety first.
parcelHealth.noSensorData: No sensor data yet. Deploy sensors or wait for satellite pass.

waterBudget.title: Water Budget
waterBudget.selectPrompt: Select a parcel to calculate irrigation needs

comparator.title: Crop Comparator
comparator.defaultPricesNote: Prices set to default (1). Economic margins equal agronomic yield. Enter real prices for economic comparison.
comparator.scoreNote: Score = weighted rank (yield 40% + margin 30% + carbon 20% + soil 10%)
